chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–02 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.42/2025 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case. Dated 24.01.2025 Mr. Abdul Moiz Jafferi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G. Syed Rizwan Shah, Immigration Officer, FIA. Mr. Amin Ahmed, Assistant Director Passports..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. In response to the memo of petition Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, learned D.A.G., has filed a report alongwith certain annexures. He submits that Annexure-A is sufficient to satisfy the grievances of the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Moiz Jafferi, learned counsel for the petitioner, has received copies of the same and has gone through the annexures and presumably in view of such attachments including the first in action the grievance of the petitioner seems to have been redressed. Apparently, the petition has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly alongwith listed application. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
